events.title: QwenLM/qwen-code cua-driver-rs v0.7.1
events.summaryText: cua-driver prebuilt binaries — relative-coordinate fork (vendored under `packages/cua-driver`). - **macOS**: codesigned + notarized universal binary + `QwenCuaDriver.app` - **Linux**: unsigned (x86_64 + arm64, glibc 2.31 floor) - **Windows**: unsigned (x86_64 + arm64) Enable relative coordinates: `CUA_DRIVER_RS_COORDINATE_SPACE=1` (default `0` = off; optional `CUA_DRIVER_RS_COORDINATE_SCALE=1000`). <!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at cua-driver-rs-v0.7.1...
